overall.description: Static first-person view of a medieval fantasy bedroom interior from a video game, featuring heavy wooden ceiling beams, stone walls, candlelit ambiance, and period furniture including a four-poster bed and wooden wardrobe. The scene remains completely stationary throughout with only subtle candle flame flickering.

simple wooden chair positioned near the desk
fabric banner or painting hanging on the stone wall above the desk

segments.scene_description: A static view of a medieval fantasy bedroom interior illuminated by candlelight. The room features heavy wooden ceiling beams, a four-poster bed with green bedding, a wooden wardrobe, and a stone wall adorned with a tapestry. The camera remains completely stationary throughout, capturing the warm ambient lighting and detailed game environment without any movement or action occurring.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a static first-person perspective of a medieval fantasy bedroom that remains constant in its candlelit atmosphere. It begins with a fixed view of the interior, highlighting the heavy wooden ceiling beams and a stone wall adorned with a tapestry. As the gaze lingers, the warm ambient lighting emphasizes the textures of a four-poster bed with green bedding and a sturdy wooden wardrobe. The scene then settles into a quiet stillness, where the only movement is the subtle flickering of candlelight across the detailed game environment.
